ratings.notes: The response shows a good understanding of the persona and context but lacks some naturalness in phrasing due to strict adherence to protocols which might seem less personable for an old royal guard. Short note: Good balance between relevance, consistency with persona, though could be more naturally worded while maintaining formality.
